ab: minhnanu’ su’ mwah?
en: A: How did you get here?

ab: minhkani’ saku’ mwah.
en: I came on foot.

ab: nanu’ ginlgan su’ mwah?
en: A: What kind of car did you take?

ab: gmnluw saku’ basu’ mwah.
en: B: I came by bus.

ab: minhnanu’ su’ musa’ kyukay?
en: A: How do you go to church?

ab: gmnluw saku’ turak ni yaba musa’.
en: B: I took a ride with my dad.

ab: mutux mhnanu’ musa’ gaku’ krryax qu hya’?
en: A: How does he usually go to school?

ab: mutux mhnanu’ musa’ gaku’ krayryax qu
en: A: How does he usually go to school?

ab: mutux gmluw cyeyun musa’ gaku’ qu hya’.
en: B: He took the subway to school.

ab: minhnanu’ musa’ mbazi ramat qu yaki’ su’?
en: A: How does your grandmother go to the grocery store?

ab: wal gmluw otobay mbazi ramat qu hya’.
en: B: She went to the grocery store on a motorcycle.

ab: phswa’ su’ musa’ Lanyu?
en: A: How are you going to get to Orchid Island?

ab: pqluw saku’ qasu’ musa’ Lanyu.
en: B: I want to take a boat to Lanyu.

ab: minhnanu’ musa’ Lanyu qu hya’?
en: A: How did he get to Orchid Island?

ab: gmnluw xikuki’ musa’ Lanyu qu hya’.
en: B: He took a plane to Orchid Island.

ab: nanu wal nya’ glgan musa’ Takaw?
en: A: What bus did he take to Kaohsiung?

ab: wal gmluw kawtye musa’ Takaw qu hya’.
en: B: He took the THSR to Kaohsiung.

ab: gmnluw kiysa’ musa’ Taytung qu hya’.
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: aw. gmnluw kisya’ musa’ Taytung qu hya’.
en: B: Yes, he took a train to Taitung.

ab: gmnluw kiysa’ musa’ Taytung qu hya’ ga?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: izyat. gmnluw xikuki’ qu hya’.
en: B: No, he took a plane to Taitung.

ab: kya nn_gan basu’ lingay qani?
en: A: Is there a bus stop near here?

ab: kya. musa’ su’ tehasa cikay lga, kktan su’ qu nn_gan basu’ la.
ch: B:有，往前走就會看到公車站了。
en: B: Yes, if you go straight ahead, you will see the bus stop.

ab: kya. musa’ su’ tayhasa cikay lga, kktan su’ qu nn_gan basu’ la.
ch: B:有，往前走就會看到公車站了。
en: B: Yes, if you go straight ahead, you will see the bus stop.

ab: cyux inu’ sqani qu sbihan glgan cyeyun.
ch: A+:離這裡最近的捷運站在哪裡?
en: A: Where is the nearest MRT station?

ab: cyux inu’ sqani qu saybihan glgan cyeyun.
ch: A:離這裡最近的捷運站在哪裡?
en: A: Where is the nearest MRT station?

ab: ungat glgan cyeyun sqani ay. siki si su’ gluw takusi’ la.
ch: B:這裡沒有捷運站，你只能坐計程車。
en: B: There is no MRT station here, you can only take a taxi.

ab: mosa’ ktwa’ kinbsyaq glgan basu’ ga, tehuk gaku’?
en: A:How long does it take to get to the school by bus?

ab: mawsa’ ktwa’ kinbsyaq glgan basu’ ga, tayhuk gaku’?
en: A:How long does it take to get to the school by bus?

ab: mopu zmagal tmucing ga, ptehuk gaku’.
en: B:15 minutes to school.

ab: mawpu zmagal tmucing ga, ptayhuk gaku’.
en: B:15 minutes to school.

ab: gmluw kawtye ga, ktwa’ kinbsyaq ga, tehuk Taycung?
ch: A+:搭高鐵要多久時間會到臺中?
en: A: How long does it take to get to Taichung by THSR?

ab: gmluw kawtye ga, ktwa’ kinbsyaq ga, tayhuk Taycung?
ch: A:搭高鐵要多久時間會到臺中?
en: A: How long does it take to get to Taichung by THSR?

ab: qutux tmucing lga, ptehuk Taycung la.
en: B: I will come to Taichung in an hour.

ab: qutux tmucing lga, ptayhuk Taycung la.
en: B: I will come to Taichung in an hour.

ab: miray turak nanak i musa’ Ulay ga, mosa’ bsyaq?
en: A: Is it a long drive to Ulai?

ab: miray turak nanak i musa’ Ulay ga, mawsa’ bsyaq?
en: A: Is it a long drive to Ulai?

ab: hazi’ mosa’ qutux tmucing.
en: B: It takes about an hour.

ab: hazi’ mawsa’ qutux tmucing.
en: B: It takes about an hour.

ab: gmluw su’ cyeyun mwah ngasal maku’ ga, ktwa’ kinbsyaq?
ch: A:你搭捷運來我家要多久?
en: A: How long did it take you to come to my house by subway?

ab: siki mpusal spung.
en: B: It takes 20 minutes.

ab: baq su’ gmluw zitensya’?
en: A: Do you know how to ride a bicycle?

ab: baq saku’ gmluw zitensya’.
en: B: I can ride a bicycle.

ab: kya otobay su’?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: kya qutux otobay maku’.
en: B: I have a motorcycle.

ab: kya otobay su’?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: ungat otobay maku’.
en: B: I don’t have a motorcycle.
